hyperedges.label: Career Readiness Tracking (Skill Gap â†’ Roadmap Progress â†’ Readiness Badges)
Proxy â†’ Auth Layout â†’ Dashboard authentication flow
CV Upload â†’ Score History â†’ Re-check Comparison Lifecycle

hyperedges.description: All four doc-builder pages share the same architectural pattern: client component with formData state, handleGenerate calling POST /api/doc/generate with a distinct docType, and displaying generatedText in a preview card. They form a cohesive doc-builder feature cluster.

Public auth pages form a complete authentication flow: login uses signIn.email, register uses signUp.email, forgot-password is a reset flow. All reference lib/auth-client and login/register both use isAdmin for role-based redirect after auth.

Core career readiness pipeline: Skill Gap Analysis identifies gaps -> Roadmap provides learning resources -> Quiz validates skill acquisition. skill-gap page links directly to /roadmap, and both share the RED/YELLOW/GREEN status system and the same Prisma skill data.

The isAdmin check from lib/roles is used in three distinct contexts: login redirect, register redirect, and admin layout guard. This forms a distributed RBAC pattern where the same function enforces admin access control at multiple entry points.
